## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and discuss concerns about content production, quality standards, and adapting to new AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Saskia is transitioning from Unstructured to Prophecy client, with concerns about output quality and production speed](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Atlas (new AI tool) shows promise but still has errors; engineering team working on improvements](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Company expectations are high-volume content (30+ articles/week) while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Balancing AI-generated content with human oversight and fact-checking remains challenging](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

## Topics

### Client Transition and Content Quality

  - [Prophecy client reportedly happy with current setup and output](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Unstructured client had high standards, causing difficulties in meeting expectations](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Saskia struggling to balance output quality with production speed](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Concern about AI-generated content not being reader-friendly or conversion-oriented](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

### AI Tool Challenges

  - [Atlas showing promise but still has errors and limitations](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Issues with word count control and following specific instructions](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Difficulty in fact-checking highly technical content generated by AI](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Need to adapt AI outputs to be more accessible to general audience](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Company Expectations and Strategy

  - [High volume content production (30+ articles/week) expected](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Balancing SEO-driven content with quality editorial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Some clients criticizing lack of strategy and conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Debate on sustainable vs. unsustainable approaches to content production](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Workflow and Best Practices

  - [Importance of client-specific processes and quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Utilizing internal channels and old client database for context and guidance](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Upcoming calls to discuss client-specific workflows and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Emphasis on using Atlas and adapting to new systems](https://fathom.video/share/fb-Vo8c_XBfgXzFu77E1qyoycz7APYK3?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
